movements.notes: same barbell throughout; no re-gripping/dropping between lifts

source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/open/2021/4 (official CrossFit Games Open workout), retrieved 2026-07-09; max-load complex -- athlete determines and builds their own barbell load (score is the heaviest complex completed), so there is no prescribed Rx weight; time begins immediately after 21.3
